title: Invalid origin error after upgrading n8n
symptom: After upgrading to n8n version 1.88, users encounter a 'ResponseError: Invalid origin!' message and a 'Connection lost' notification in the UI.
not_this_if: Running n8n without a reverse proxy
Error occurs in a different environment
root_cause: The error occurs due to misconfiguration in the reverse proxy settings, which fails to properly set the Origin header. This can happen when the proxy does not preserve the original host or does not forward the correct headers, leading to n8n rejecting the request as coming from an invalid origin.
fix_steps: Edit the Apache configuration file for the reverse proxy.
Add the following lines: 'ProxyPreserveHost On', 'RequestHeader set Origin "https://your-n8n-domain"', 'RequestHeader set X-Forwarded-Proto https'.
Restart the Apache server to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the Apache proxy configuration to preserve the host and set the correct Origin header.
